heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyLast update time: May 27, 2023 (version 1.0.2)This Privacy Policy applies to all of the Android apps offered by RYO SOFTWARE.If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please feel free to contact us atinfo@ryosoftware.com.If you use any app from RYO SOFTWARE you expressly accept this Privacy Policy.

heading_content_part: o store trace logs on the sdcard to detect issues and malfunctions.This option is disabled by default and must be manually activated by the user.The transmission of the logs to the apps developers is done by email at the request of the user, who can check the data and files that will be sent before sending and/or cancel the shipment before it occurs.
Email communicationIf you contact us by email or using the form enabled on our website, you must keep in mind that we will
store the information you provide, including your email address.In no case we will share your email address and/or personal information to any person outside RYO SOFTWARE.

heading_content_part: In any case, I can't control what is exactly the data the Ads partners are collecting from you, but for the case of other partners than Google Admob we are displaying a consent dialog at the first app start.

heading_content_part: Refunds policy for licenses acquired through apps storesIf you have acquired a license to use any of our products through an apps store (and specially the InApps of our apps purchased through the Google Play Store) and wish to request a refund, you must do so using the forms provided by said apps store.

decoder_heading: Refunds policy for licenses acquired through apps stores
ident_heading: Refunds policy for licenses acquired through apps stores
heading_content_part: If the apps store offers a maximum time to request the refund and that period has already passed, or if the store through which you purchased the product does not offer such possibility, please do not contact us to request it.
Contacting usAny questions in respect of this policy should be sent to the following email address:info@ryosoftware.com.

Changes to this Privacy PolicyPlease note that this Privacy Policy may change from time to time.We will not reduce your rights under this Privacy Policy without your explicit consent.We will post any Privacy Policy changes on this page and, if the changes are significant, we will provide a dialog into the main activity of the RYO SOFTWARE apps.
